content: GIET UNIVERSITY, GUNUPUR LETTER NO: S1GIETU/2023 DATE: 21/03/2023 CIRCULAR SUB: BLOOD DONATION CAMP NSS wing of GIET University will organize Blood Donation Camp on 22.03.2023 in MBA Auditorium at 09.00 AM. I request all the Hods to inform the staff members & students about this program and make it a grand success. DEAN School of Engineering &Technology GIET UNIVERSITY GUNUPUR Copy to: Director General, Vice-Chancellor & Registrar. Dean(Academics)/ Dean(AGYHOD PG All Deans of School (circulate all Teaching and Non-Teaching Staff of their Department) All Coordinators B. Tech. and M. Tech. Programmes. Deputy Registrar /1QAC Cell/Warden(Campus/Warden(Town)-to Circulate to all sWos/PROLibrary/T&P Cel/HR Cell/A.ccounts Sec/Admission Sec/Audit Sec/Exam Sec/Dispensary/Sports Officer/Alumni Officer/Security Officer/Canteen Manager/Central Mess/ Guest house Manager/Management of Campus Facilities/ Transport Supervisor/Central Storel/All Hostel and Institute Notice Boards/Reception
